name: Yantai North Andre Juice Company Limited
summary: Yantai North Andre Juice Company Limited manufactures and sells various fruit and vegetable juices, fruit pulp, essence, pomace, biological feed, and related products in China, North America, Asia, Europe, Oceania, South America, and Africa. It also manufactures fruit and vegetable beverages, apple juice concentrate, pear juice concentrate, peach puree and juice, haw juice concentrate, sweet potato juice concentrate, strawberry puree and juice concentrate, bio-feedstuff, apple fructose, pear fructose, drinking water, and other products. In addition, the company manufactures iron drums for juice outer packaging; purchases agricultural and sideline products; imports and exports goods and technology; and manufactures and sells of lemon and orange juice, lemon oil and essence, and orange oil and essence. Further, it is involved in the biological comprehensive utilization of apple essence, pomace, vegetables, and other products; and import and export of juice and pulp. The company was founded in 1996 and is headquartered in Yantai, the People's Republic of China.
